title: Alpina MEGVE4690/371 Stainless Steel Knife Sets
features: Cheese knife set - knife with cut-outs for soft cheeses such as Brie or Camembert - prevents sticking and makes cutting easier.
CHEESE KNIFE WITH WOODEN HANDLE - Ergonomic wooden handle provides secure grip and stylish presentation at table.
2-piece cheese knife set - Includes a knife with openings for soft cheese and a smooth knife for hard cheese.
CHEESE KNIFE FOR CHEESE PLATE - Ideal for tapas, cheese platters or buffets - practical and decorative at the same time.
Gold cheese knife - Gold surface as an elegant eye-catcher for guests or festive occasions.
description: This 2-piece cheese knife set from alpina is suitable for cutting and serving a wide range of cheeses. It includes a knife with cut-outs for soft cheese and a smooth knife for hard cheese. • Gold coloured blades with wooden handle • One knife for soft cheese, one for hard cheese. • Cut-outs prevent sticking to soft cheese • Robust handle for controlled cutting • Ideal for cheese platters and buffets Practical and visually suitable for any cheese plate. Specifications alpina cheese knife set • Brand: alpina • Set contents: 2 pieces. • Material: stainless steel (blade), wood (handle). • Colour: Gold and Brown • Suitable for: soft and hard cheeses.
